extensionDescription.message: Professional Arabic typography correction for each website. Letter-spacing siamrem, Arabic font mawi tak tak inject a, rendering buaina awmtu Arabic text disjoin te siamrem.

masterToggleAriaLabel.message: Arabic Type extension hi activate emaw deactivate emaw rawh

letterSpacingNote.message: Arabic letter-te inkungkaih loh nan letter-spacing hi engtik laiin 0-ah dah a ni. Hei hi web-ah Arabic rendering tihchheh chhan ber a ni.

forceRTLDescription.message: Arabic text block-te hi right-ah tangin left-ah tihpek rawh. Arabic hi left-ah tangin right-ah dik loh tak a langna site-te tana activate rawh.

diacriticsDescription.message: Arabic vowel mark (tashkeel) rendering te hi text line chung leh hnuaiah clip loh nan siamrem rawh.

siteFontOverrideLabel.message: He site-ah hian font dang hmang rawh

siteFontOverrideDescription.message: He site atan chauh font dang thlang la, i global font thlang chu override rawh.

fontSourceNote.message: Font-te hi Google Fonts-in a pek a ni. Initial load nan internet connection a ngai.

fontPrivacyNote.message: Font request-te hi Google server-ah rawn thawn a ni. fonts.google.com/privacy-ah en rawh.

statusGlobalMode.message: Global mode hmang a ni — lang/dir attributes hmuh.

statusNoArabic.message: He page-ah hian Arabic text a awm lo.

statusSiteDisabled.message: He site-ah hian disabled a ni.

statusContentScriptUnavailable.message: He page-ah hian access theih loh.

siteBannerText.message: Arabic Type hi $HOSTNAME$-ah hian disabled a ni.

removeExceptionAriaLabel.message: Disabled sites atangin $HOSTNAME$ hi paih rawh
